task2_captcha_report.current_status: ERROR_WRONG_USER_KEY - the 2captcha getkey endpoint is returning an error. The TWOCAPTCHA_API_KEY secret was updated today but the login/password-based key retrieval is failing. Balance is effectively $0 or unknown.
integration_points: sweepstakes_auto_entry_bot.py - uses 2captcha to solve reCAPTCHA v2 during sweepstakes form entry
affiliate_engine.py - uses 2captcha as fallback for affiliate signup forms with captchas
twocaptcha_setup_bot.py - dedicated bot to login to 2captcha.com via Playwright, extract API key, save to GitHub Secrets
task2_captcha_report.other_captcha_services: None. Only 2Captcha is configured. No anticaptcha, capmonster, or capsolver references found.

task3_sweepstakes_report.honest_assessment: ZERO sweepstakes have been actually entered. Every single run follows the same pattern: (1) sweepstakes_email_parser_bot.py runs and finds 'No sweepstakes digest emails found. Waiting for Priya to classify them.' (2) sweepstakes_auto_entry_bot.py starts, fails to get 2Captcha API key (ERROR_WRONG_USER_KEY), then checks sweepstakes_queue table which has 0 entries, and exits with 'Queue empty'. The workflow succeeds (exit 0) because it uses '|| echo done' error suppression, but no actual sweepstakes entries are being made.
root_causes: 1. Priya email classifier is not populating sweepstakes_queue - the email parser depends on Priya having already classified emails as SWEEPSTAKES type, but no emails are being classified
2. 2Captcha API key retrieval is broken - ERROR_WRONG_USER_KEY from the getkey endpoint, meaning even if queue had entries, captcha-protected ones would fail
3. The sweepstakes_queue Supabase table appears to have 0 pending entries

tracking_files.sweepstakes_db: data/sweepstakes.db exists (303KB SQLite), used by sweepstakes_digest_bot.py to track found sweepstakes from RSS feeds
tracking_files.latest_digest_html: data/latest_digest.html exists with 25 sweepstakes entries scraped from RSS feeds (Sweepstakes Bible, iLoveGiveaways, Sweepstakes Lovers)

sweepstakes_bots: bots/sweepstakes_digest_bot.py - scrapes RSS feeds, builds HTML digest email, stores in local SQLite DB
bots/sweepstakes_email_parser_bot.py - parses incoming digest emails (from Priya), extracts URLs to sweepstakes_queue
bots/sweepstakes_auto_entry_bot.py - reads sweepstakes_queue, opens each URL with Playwright, fills forms, submits entries
task3_sweepstakes_report.pipeline_gap: The digest bot FINDS sweepstakes (25 in latest digest) and the auto-entry bot CAN enter them, but the middle step (Priya classifying emails -> parser populating queue) is the broken link. The queue stays empty so nothing gets entered.
